'''bobapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagey|imagey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagey|imagey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bobapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobapithi|bobapithi]] || [[word:bobapiji|bobapiji]] || [[word:bobapishi|bobapishi]] || [[word:bobapiki|bobapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobaputhuthu|bobaputhuthu]] || [[word:bobapujuju|bobapujuju]] || [[word:bobapushushu|bobapushushu]] || [[word:bobapukuku|bobapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobaputhu|bobaputhu]] || [[word:bobapuju|bobapuju]] || [[word:bobapushu|bobapushu]] || [[word:bobapuku|bobapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobapufthuf|bobapufthuf]] || [[word:bobapufjuf|bobapufjuf]] || [[word:bobapufshuf|bobapufshuf]] || [[word:bobapufkuf|bobapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobapethe|bobapethe]] || [[word:bobapeje|bobapeje]] || [[word:bobapeshe|bobapeshe]] || [[word:bobapeke|bobapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobapothotho|bobapothotho]] || [[word:bobapojojo|bobapojojo]] || [[word:bobaposhosho|bobaposhosho]] || [[word:bobapokoko|bobapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobapotho|bobapotho]] || [[word:bobapojo|bobapojo]] || [[word:bobaposho|bobaposho]] || [[word:bobapoko|bobapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobapofthof|bobapofthof]] || [[word:bobapofjof|bobapofjof]] || [[word:bobapofshof|bobapofshof]] || [[word:bobapofkof|bobapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfthÃŸf|bobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfjÃŸf|bobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfshÃŸf|bobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfkÃŸf|bobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfthÃŸf|bobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfjÃŸf|bobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfshÃŸf|bobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfkÃŸf|bobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfthÃŸf|bobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfjÃŸf|bobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfshÃŸf|bobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobapÃŸfkÃŸf|bobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobapÃḊthÃḊ|bobapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bobapÃḊjÃḊ|bobapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bobapÃḊshÃḊ|bobapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bobapÃḊkÃḊ|bobapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobapathatha|bobapathatha]] || [[word:bobapajaja|bobapajaja]] || [[word:bobapashasha|bobapashasha]] || [[word:bobapakaka|bobapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobapatha|bobapatha]] || [[word:bobapaja|bobapaja]] || [[word:bobapasha|bobapasha]] || [[word:bobapaka|bobapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobapafthaf|bobapafthaf]] || [[word:bobapafjaf|bobapafjaf]] || [[word:bobapafshaf|bobapafshaf]] || [[word:bobapafkaf|bobapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bobapasha|bobapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobapshÃḋsha|bobapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobaprosha|bobaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobapmusha|bobapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobapyasha|bobapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobapnkshÃḋsha|gobobapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobapnkrosha|gobobapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobapnkmusha|gobobapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobapnkyasha|gobobapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bobabapasha|bobabapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobabapshÃḋsha|bobabapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobabaprosha|bobabaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobabapmusha|bobabapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobabapyasha|bobabapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobabapnkshÃḋsha|gobobabapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobabapnkrosha|gobobabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobabapnkmusha|gobobabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobabapnkyasha|gobobabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bebÃḊpasha|bebÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bebÃḊpshÃḋsha|bebÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bebÃḊprosha|bebÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bebÃḊpmusha|bebÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bebÃḊpyasha|bebÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gobebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobebÃḊpnkrosha|gobebÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobebÃḊpnkmusha|gobebÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobebÃḊpnkyasha|gobebÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bobfapasha|bobfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobfapshÃḋsha|bobfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobfaprosha|bobfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobfapmusha|bobfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobfapyasha|bobfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobfapnkshÃḋsha|gobobfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobfapnkrosha|gobobfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobfapnkmusha|gobobfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobfapnkyasha|gobobfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
